name: LoyaltyBaseEntry
description: LoyaltyBaseEntry schema from Burger King's Partners API

availability.description:
Whether or not the entry is available.
If this property is undefined, then the entry will be marked as available.

discountType.description:
Provides if the discount should be calculated as a percentage or an amount.

*Note: this is only available for `"DISCOUNT"` type.*

| Discount Type | Calculation |
|---|---|
| `"AMOUNT"` | `Price - discountValue` |
| `"PERCENTAGE"` | `Price - (discountValue% of Price)` |

discountValue.description:
Amount that should be discounted.

*Note: this is only available for `"DISCOUNT"` type.*

| Discount Type | Discount Value unit |
|---|---|
| `"AMOUNT"` | Dollar amount |
| `"PERCENTAGE"` | Percentage discount |

loyaltyPoints.description: Amount of Loyalty Points required to redeem this offer

options.description: Collection of typed references to other entities in the menu.

entries.description:
Depending of the type, the entity referenced will be located
in different places of the menu:

| Type | Entity Location |
|---|---|
| `"ENTRY"` | `entries` |
| `"SYSTEM_WIDE_OFFER"` | `systemWideOfferEntries` |
| `"REWARD"` | `rewardEntries` |
| `"CONFIG_OFFER"` | `configOfferEntries` |
